codeReview.summary: Pass. The diff routes the admin metrics reader and portal/report runtime enforcement through the canonical tenant runtime service, preserves same-node cache invalidation on successful canonical policy writes, and adds targeted auth, company, portal, report, and truthsuite coverage for canonical block/recovery behavior.
